title: OpenKYCAML PredictiveAML Extension v1.11.2
description: Standalone predictive AML extension schema. Defines the PredictiveAML object for use as an optional top-level sibling to kycProfile in an OpenKYCAML envelope. Provides ML-ready, explainable, auditable risk payloads compliant with EU AI Act Art. 13 (high-risk AML system transparency), AMLR Art. 22(5) (third-party reliance with provenance), and BCBS 239 (risk data aggregation). v1.11.2 adds optional cellLevelPredictiveScores[] for per-cell scoring in PCC/ICC structures. For integration instructions see docs/guides/adoption-guide.md.

modelMetadata.description: EU AI Act-aligned model card metadata (Art. 13 transparency obligations for high-risk AI systems in AML).

modelId.description: Unique identifier for the AML model (e.g. UUID or vendor model reference).

provider.description: Name or DID of the model provider / vendor.

trainingDate.description: ISO 8601 date-time when the model was last trained.

euAiActClassification.description: EU AI Act Annex III classification. AML transaction monitoring and customer risk scoring systems are presumed 'high-risk-aml' under Art. 6(2) and Annex III point 5(b).

conformityAssessmentReference.description: Reference to the EU AI Act conformity assessment record (Art. 43) or notified body certificate number. Required when euAiActClassification = 'high-risk-aml'.

predictiveScores.description: Array of typed predictive risk scores produced by the model.

value.description: Score value on a 0-100 scale (0 = lowest risk, 100 = highest risk).

confidence.description: Model confidence in this score (0-1). EU AI Act Art. 13(3)(b)(iv) requires confidence or reliability information.

horizonDays.description: Forward-looking horizon in calendar days (e.g. 30 = 30-day anomaly probability).

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 date-time when this score was computed.

featureVector.description: Optional hashed or privacy-preserved feature vector used to generate the scores. Keys are feature names; values are numeric, string, or boolean. Personal data MUST be hashed or pseudonymised before inclusion (GDPR Art. 25 data minimisation).

explainability.description: EU AI Act Art. 13 explainability output.

values.description: Method-specific explanation output (e.g. SHAP feature importance values keyed by feature name).

riskEvolutionHistory.description: Ordered history of overall risk snapshots enabling delta-based continuous KYC (cKYC).

alertCorrelationId.description: Opaque correlation identifier linking this predictive payload to a transaction monitoring alert. Enables closed-loop feedback from alert disposition to model retrain.

bcbs239ComplianceLevel.description: Self-assessed BCBS 239 compliance level for this data aggregation.

lastAggregationTimestamp.description: ISO 8601 date-time of the most recent data aggregation run.

dataLineageReference.description: Opaque reference to the data lineage or provenance record.

cellLevelPredictiveScores.description: Optional array of per-cell predictive AML scores for cell-structured entities (PCC/ICC). Each entry references a specific cell by its cellIdentifier and carries one or more risk scores. Enables cell-level predictive scoring where individual cells carry materially different risk profiles from the parent Core.

cellIdentifier.description: The cellIdentifier of the target cell (references CellCompanyDetails.cellIdentifier on the corresponding LegalPerson record).

scores.description: One or more risk scores for this cell.

value.description: Score value on a 0–100 scale (0 = lowest risk, 100 = highest risk).

horizonDays.description: Forward-looking horizon in calendar days over which the score is predictive.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 date-time when this score was computed.
